name: Apple Brown Betty
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear toast into bite-size pieces.
2. Place the pieces in a greased 1-1/2-quart casserole dish.
3. Top with apples.
4. Combine sugars and cinnamon; sprinkle over apples.
5. Drizzle with butter.
6. Cover.
7. Bake at 350°F for 60 minutes, stirring after 30 minutes.
8. Serve warm with cream.
